Off Calendar Feb-24-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-15-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendants Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiff To Attend A Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Defendants' Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiff To Attend A Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions is taken off calendar as a duplicate entry. (302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiff Jessica Wells To Attend A Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities And Declaration Of Norine Busser In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Plaintiff JESSICA N. WELLS, Tel No. (808) 366-6611 appearing telephonically in pro per;
Atty. NORINE BUSSER, ESQ. of the Law Offices of Melissa M. Ballard, Tel No. (714) 371-2310 appearing for the defendants.

Matter argued by the parties. The Court modified its tentative ruling and ordered as follows: Defendant's motion for an order compelling plaintiff to attend a deposition and for monetary sanctions is granted. The deposition shall be held within 10 days of the Court's order. The Court waives monetary sanctions. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Adrian Colley, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported.

Defendants Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiff To Attend A Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Continued To Jul-16-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants Motion For An Order Compelling Plaintiff To Attend A Deposition And For Monetary Sanctions is continued to July 16, 2015 on the court's own motion. Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquist, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported (302).
